name: Prebuild Lifecycle Helper
description: Analyzes devcontainer.json lifecycle commands, detects dependency installations in non-prebuild hooks, and optionally rewrites configuration to leverage Codespaces prebuild caching

failOnWarning.description: Fail the build if dependency installations are detected in non-prebuild hooks

fixMode.description: Automatically rewrite devcontainer.json to move dependency installations to updateContentCommand

detectLanguages.description: Comma-separated list of languages to scan for (auto, node, python, rust, ruby, go, php, java, dotnet). 'auto' scans all known lockfiles.
